raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need find foo in /workspace, then ls -l sorted by modification date. Use find then ls -l --time-style=long-iso? Actually sort by modification date: ls -lt. But need only foo. So find /workspace -name foo -exec ls -lt {} +. That will list each. If multiple, sorted by date? ls -lt sorts by modification time. So command: find /workspace -name foo -exec ls -lt {} +.
raw_output_payload.reasoning_content: Need find foo in /workspace, then ls -l sorted by modification date. Use find then ls -l --time-style=long-iso? Actually sort by modification date: ls -lt. But need only foo. So find /workspace -name foo -exec ls -lt {} +. That will list each. If multiple, sorted by date? ls -lt sorts by modification time. So command: find /workspace -name foo -exec ls -lt {} +.

task.query: search for the file foo in  the /workspace folder and display a long listing of it in sorted order of modification date
